rationale_overall: Watchlist is at the 12-ticker cap and already reflects the profile's wave thesis with strong coverage: AI exposure via NVDA, MSFT, GOOGL, AAPL, SMH, and BOTZ (BOTZ also touches robotics); nuclear via URA and CCJ; rockets/spacecraft via ARKX; clean-energy adjacency via ICLN; and a general-markets/duration sleeve via SPY and AGG. As of mid-2023, the citable AI-wave catalysts (ChatGPT launch Nov 2022, MSFT-OpenAI $10B in Jan 2023, GPT-4 in Mar 2023, Nvidia's $11B Q2 guide on May 24 2023) all argue for staying on the current AI exposures rather than rotating; the SVB episode in Mar 2023 is a financial-sector event, not a thesis breach for any current holding. Quiet quarter; no changes.
